images.prompt: Which image best represents the ram caught nearby in Genesis 22?

reasons.ram-caught-thicket.png: Shows the clearest visual of the ram caught nearby, which matches Genesis 22 directly.
reasons.moriah-mountain.png: Represents the journey setting, but not the ram itself.
reasons.wood-and-fire-journey.png: Represents the trip and supplies, but not the nearby ram.
reasons.altar-stones-moriah.png: Represents the mountain altar setting, but not the animal Abraham saw.

images.prompt: Which image best represents Rebekah giving water at the well?

reasons.rebekah-well-water.png: Shows the clearest action of a young woman giving water at a well, matching Genesis 24 directly.
reasons.camels-at-well.png: Represents the camels at the well, but not Rebekah's action itself.
reasons.water-jar-near-well.png: Represents an object from the scene, but not the person giving water.
reasons.desert-travel-camels.png: Represents the servant's caravan journey, but not the well encounter.
